description: Style Note Keep your essentials together stylishly in this multifunction wallet from baggit. This light weight and slim, simply designed wallet and an imprinted brand mark reveals dual sided flap with snap button closure. It has multiple pockets inside which makes it spacious. Grab it and add a bit to your daily style. Product Details Three fold purple wallet with magnetic press button flap closure Graphic print and zip detailing on the front Seven card holders and one id card holder on the second fold Six card holders and two insert pockets on the right fold One main zippered compartment separated by a pocket with zip closure Branding on the back and one zippered pocket  Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust  Size Height: 10 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 2 cm
